action_text: Choose "Short description" from the filter field dropdown
rationale: The filter builder is open and the field dropdown is expanded; selecting “Short description” is the first step to define the condition.

action_text: Open the operator dropdown for the current filter condition
rationale: After choosing the field, we need to set the operator to match text; opening the operator dropdown enables selecting “contains.”

action_text: Select "Short description" in the header search field selector
rationale: As an alternate, the list’s header search can filter by field; setting it to “Short description” prepares for typing the target string.

action_text: Type "#SERIES-c8c8c533-7" into the list header search box
rationale: Using the header search directly is a faster alternative to the filter builder to find rows where the short description contains the series tag.

action_text: Toggle “Show column search row” to display per-column filters
rationale: Per‑column search is another route; enabling the column search row would allow filtering the “Short description” column specifically.
